column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Manatee County. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest information.
Is the arrow point to where a tornado was seen? Or just to the red triangle?
the red is the area for the warning
I know that. The arrow looks to be pointing to a specific spot, I wanted to know if that’s the location of here a tornado was seen…
no tornados have formed. Just radar noticed rotations. That's all
Warning is over. We are good now
Is anyone else getting notifications of this now ? 🫠
